title: Unoverse definition
description: Editor guidance for rx/ definitions (UNOVERSE_AUTHORING.md, UNOVERSE_LAYERS.md). A file with `unoverse` is a definition envelope; otherwise it is a bare node partial (components/ , states/ , layouts/ , $include siblings). Structural only — style/bind/props/action stay freeform so no valid value is ever flagged.

description.description: What it is. For a component with a manifest.json, meta lives in the MANIFEST (single home) — do not duplicate here.

whenToUse.description: Selection text. Lives in manifest.json when the component is discoverable — never duplicated in the envelope.

defaultState.description: The named state this component opens in — an OPEN name (e.g. "focus"), written to template state on publish; templates branch on it by name. Omit for a plain inline component. (Legacy fallback: displayState default "focused" ⇒ "focus".)

props.description: EXTERNAL contract — the rare workflow-fed inputs (input: true). Static content is HARDCODED in the tree; internal state lives in `state`.

state.description: SCALAR internal view-state ONLY, with initial values (step, phase, progressPct). Arrays/objects/URLs are content/data slop — hardcode in the layout or use props input:true. The arrival defaultState lives in manifest.json, not here.

stateOrder.description: The states/*.json files, in explicit order (Studio picker + mock walk). Must name exactly the files.

additionalProperties.comment: Validate real (object) prop defs; leave non-object values (e.g. `_comment_*` JSON comments) alone so they're never flagged.

input.description: true = fed by the workflow at runtime (the default is just the mock).

outputs.description: Component OUTPUT contract (components only): keys this component writes to its own slice (via setValue) that are its PRODUCT — e.g. a wizard's answers. nodegen projects them as the generated node's output ports; the node emits them (standard promise __outputs) when a run carries the submitted component state. View-state keys (step, progress…) must NOT be declared. See UNOVERSE_NODE_RUNTIME.md § Component outputs.

enum.description: Closed set of allowed values (option values). Doubles as the MCP elicitation enum so foreign hosts render a select, not free text.

$include.description: Inline a sibling file (recursively). Path is relative to the ROOT definition folder — e.g. "components/header", "states/welcome", "layouts/compact".

type.description: The closed primitive set (UNOVERSE_AUTHORING.md §10). Adding to it is an SDK change gated by guard tests.

props.description: Ref field remap: atomField → your data field.

on.description: Switch discriminant — the field whose value selects a case.

cases.description: Switch branches: value → node. A branch must NOT re-check its own value (a layer never guards itself — UNOVERSE_LAYERS.md §3).

select.description: ComponentSlot filter: {} = the conversation flow; a REACTION surface adds where:{field,eq} (+ from:"all", limit:1) — select by STATE, never by component type (STATE_MODEL §5b).

frame.description: ComponentSlot ONLY: the surface chrome the selected component renders inside (the inner ComponentSlot is the placement).

value.description: Text literal content — components are microapps: static copy is HARDCODED (bind wins when present).

items.description: Each ONLY: literal hardcoded rows (the microapp default). Workflow-fed lists use bind.items instead.

src.description: Image literal src (bind.src wins when present).

alt.description: Image literal alt (bind.alt wins when present).

style.description: Token names only — never raw px/rem/#hex (LAW 1); values live in rx/styles. KEYS are the closed cross-platform vocabulary (the set the SDK style interpreter maps — sdk/style.ts); an unknown key is a typo or a web-ism no renderer implements.

when.description: Data-driven style variants: entries whose condition holds merge `apply` over the base (docs: the four moves).

condition.description: A small declarative predicate — NOT a language. Pick ONE of eq / ne / in, or (with none) a truthy test on the named field. No and/or/arithmetic (UNOVERSE_AUTHORING.md §7).

oneOf.description: Truthy test on this field/flag (empty array = falsy).
